name: Bored Smashing - GROCERY STORE PHONES!
overview: Bored Smashing - GROCERY STORE PHONES! is a series made by Plainrock124 and a mini-series of the larger Bored Smashing series. The series originally featured King smashing prepaid phones he found at his local Fry's Food and Drug and later Walmart (since he moved), but since episode 8, it is now a series of King smashing strange or unique phones. It currently has 16 and a half episode
